name: enable_eevee_quality
side_effects: side effects depend on usage

name: reset_scene
side_effects: purges all data-blocks and resets the scene
notes: wipes orphan data; call once at start of script

name: safe_engine
return: the best available render engine identifier on this Blender build.
side_effects: mutates scene view-transform / engine settings
notes: falls back to CYCLES if requested engine unavailable

name: save_blend
side_effects: writes a .blend file to disk
notes: creates parent dirs; relative paths resolve to bpy cwd

name: set_filmic_high_contrast
return: a dict with the resolved view_transform and look strings.
side_effects: mutates scene view-transform / engine settings

name: set_output_path
side_effects: sets scene.render.filepath

name: add_barrel
signature: add_barrel(name, location, radius=0.35, height=0.85, wood_material=None, band_material=None)
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_cone
signature: add_cone(name, location, radius1, radius2, depth, material=None, vertices=32)
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_cube
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_curtain
signature: add_curtain(name, location, width=1.2, height=2.4, segments_x=6, segments_y=12, material=None, wave_amplitude=0.08)
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_cyl
signature: add_cyl(name, location, radius, depth, material=None, vertices=32)
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_door_frame
signature: add_door_frame(name, location, width=0.9, height=2.1, depth=0.25, material=None)
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_gargoyle
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_haybale
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_market_stall
signature: add_market_stall(name, location, width=2.5, depth=1.5, height=2.2, awning_color=(0.5, 0.15, 0.1), wood_material=None)
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_plane
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_rug
signature: add_rug(name, location, size_x=2.0, size_y=3.0, thickness=0.04, color=(0.6, 0.2, 0.1))
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_torch
signature: add_torch(name, location, mount_dir='+X', wood_material=None, flame_color=(1.0, 0.55, 0.15), flame_strength=12.0)
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_torus
signature: add_torus(name, location, major_radius=1.0, minor_radius=0.25, rotation=(0.0, 0.0, 0.0), material=None, major_segments=48, minor_segments=12)
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_tree_cluster
side_effects: creates many mesh objects in the current scene
notes: low-poly trees; cap count to bound poly budget

name: add_well
signature: add_well(name, location, radius=1.0, depth=0.6, well_height=1.0, stone_material=None, water_material=None)
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene

name: add_window_cutout
side_effects: creates one or more mesh objects in the current scene
notes: boolean cuts hole then frames it

name: auto_bevel
side_effects: adds and applies a modifier on the target
notes: marks sharp edges by angle then bevels

name: boolean_difference
side_effects: applies a boolean modifier (mutates target mesh)
notes: applies modifier; target mesh must be manifold

name: build_room_box
signature: build_room_box(name_prefix, width, depth, height, wall_thickness=0.2, material=None)
side_effects: creates a multi-mesh enclosure / backdrop

name: chain_between
signature: chain_between(name_prefix, p_start, p_end, link_count=8, link_radius=0.08, material=None)
side_effects: side effects depend on usage

name: cleanup_materials
side_effects: mutates objects and material slots in place
notes: removes unused slots and orphan datablocks

name: crenellate_line
signature: crenellate_line(name_prefix, p0, p1, z_top, material=None, merlon_w=0.4, merlon_h=0.7, merlon_t=0.4, gap=0.4)
side_effects: side effects depend on usage
notes: merlons along a line; cap count

name: cyclorama_backdrop
side_effects: creates a multi-mesh enclosure / backdrop

name: decimate_mesh
side_effects: adds and applies a modifier on the target

name: flag_banner
signature: flag_banner(name, location, width=0.8, height=1.2, color=(0.7, 0.08, 0.08), pole_height=2.0)
side_effects: side effects depend on usage

name: flying_buttress
signature: flying_buttress(name, anchor_low, anchor_high, thickness=0.4, material=None, segments=8)
side_effects: side effects depend on usage

name: gable_roof
signature: gable_roof(name, location, length, width, height, material=None)
side_effects: side effects depend on usage

name: low_poly_tree
signature: low_poly_tree(name, location, height=4.0, trunk_radius=0.18, leaf_color=(0.18, 0.45, 0.2), trunk_color=(0.3, 0.18, 0.08))
side_effects: side effects depend on usage

name: normalize_imported
side_effects: mutates objects and material slots in place
notes: recenters origin and scales to fit unit cube

name: paving_stones
signature: paving_stones(name_prefix, area_min, area_max, tile_size=0.5, height=0.05, material=None, jitter=0.04, color_jitter=0.08)
side_effects: side effects depend on usage

name: place_on_floor
side_effects: translates the object so its base z=floor
notes: translates obj.location.z so bbox-min sits on floor

name: pointed_arch_window
signature: pointed_arch_window(name, location, width, height, depth, material=None, facing='-Y', frame_thickness=0.15, frame_material=None)
side_effects: side effects depend on usage

name: scatter_grass_tufts
side_effects: creates many mesh objects in the current scene

name: scatter_rocks
side_effects: creates many mesh objects in the current scene

name: stone_block_band
signature: stone_block_band(name_prefix, p0, p1, z_bottom, z_top, block_w=0.6, block_h=0.4, depth=0.15, material=None, jitter=0.05, seed=0)
side_effects: side effects depend on usage

name: tower_windows
signature: tower_windows(name_prefix, center_xy, tower_radius, z_levels, count_per_level=4, slit_w=0.18, slit_h=1.2, material=None, frame_material=None)
side_effects: side effects depend on usage

name: mat
signature: mat(name, color, roughness=0.7, metallic=0.0, emission=None, emission_strength=1.0)
side_effects: get-or-creates a material data-block
notes: get-or-create by name; safe to call repeatedly

name: procedural_canvas_flag
side_effects: creates a material data-block with shader nodes
notes: creates new material each call; reuse via mat() if needed

name: procedural_dirt_path
side_effects: creates a material data-block with shader nodes
notes: creates new material each call; reuse via mat() if needed

name: procedural_grass
side_effects: creates a material data-block with shader nodes
notes: creates new material each call; reuse via mat() if needed

name: procedural_metal_aged
side_effects: creates a material data-block with shader nodes
notes: creates new material each call; reuse via mat() if needed

name: procedural_slate_tiles
side_effects: creates a material data-block with shader nodes
notes: creates new material each call; reuse via mat() if needed

name: procedural_stone
side_effects: creates a material data-block with shader nodes
notes: creates new material each call; reuse via mat() if needed

name: procedural_water
side_effects: creates a material data-block with shader nodes
notes: creates new material each call; reuse via mat() if needed

name: procedural_wood
side_effects: creates a material data-block with shader nodes
notes: creates new material each call; reuse via mat() if needed

name: add_area_light
signature: add_area_light(name, location, rotation_euler, energy=100.0, size=1.0, color=(1, 1, 1))
side_effects: creates lights / emissive geometry in the scene

name: add_cloud_drifts
side_effects: creates lights / emissive geometry in the scene
notes: cap count to keep render time reasonable (pitfall 31)

name: add_emissive_plane
side_effects: creates lights / emissive geometry in the scene

name: add_volumetric_fog
side_effects: creates lights / emissive geometry in the scene
notes: uses a large cube with volume scatter shader

name: hdri_world
side_effects: modifies scene.world.node_tree
notes: loads HDRI from path; check filepath exists

name: rim_light
side_effects: creates lights / emissive geometry in the scene

name: set_hosek_sky
side_effects: modifies scene.world.node_tree
notes: uses HOSEK_WILKIE; NISHITA missing in some 4.x builds

name: set_sunset_world
side_effects: modifies scene.world.node_tree
notes: warm gradient via Sky Texture nodes

name: set_world_sky
side_effects: modifies scene.world.node_tree
notes: preset entry point for sky textures

name: studio_dark_world
side_effects: modifies scene.world.node_tree
notes: neutral dark grey world for product shots

name: three_point_light
side_effects: creates lights / emissive geometry in the scene

name: warm_key_light
side_effects: creates lights / emissive geometry in the scene
notes: single warm key with soft falloff

name: add_camera_dof
return: the camera object, or None if no camera was found.
side_effects: mutates camera DOF settings
notes: set focus object first, then aperture

name: auto_frame
signature: auto_frame(objects, padding=1.2, elevation_deg=30, azimuth_deg=45, lens=35, name='SkillCamera')
side_effects: creates or replaces the SkillCamera and points it at targets
notes: wraps frame_camera with bounding-box of all visible meshes

name: bbox_of
side_effects: no side effects (pure)

name: frame_camera
signature: frame_camera(target=(0, 0, 0), distance=18, elevation_deg=35, azimuth_deg=45, lens=35, name='SkillCamera')
side_effects: creates or replaces the SkillCamera and points it at targets
notes: removes any existing SkillCamera before creating new one

name: setup_turntable
signature: setup_turntable(subject_obj, frame_start=1, frame_end=120, radius=None, height_offset=0.3, lens=85)
side_effects: creates a turntable rig and inserts keyframes
notes: inserts orbit keyframes on a parent empty

name: enable_denoising
side_effects: mutates scene.render / scene timeline settings

name: set_render
side_effects: mutates scene.render / scene timeline settings
notes: use this rather than poking scene.render directly

name: set_render_resolution
side_effects: mutates scene.render / scene timeline settings

name: bezier_orbit_keyframes
signature: bezier_orbit_keyframes(center, radius, height, n_samples=8, frame_start=1, frame_end=120, ccw=True)
side_effects: inserts keyframes on the target object

name: bird_flight_keyframes
side_effects: inserts keyframes on the target object

name: keyframe_camera_path
side_effects: inserts keyframes on the target object

name: render_animation_frames
signature: render_animation_frames(output_dir, frame_start, frame_end, file_prefix='frame_', resolution=None, samples=None, file_format='PNG')
side_effects: writes rendered images to disk
notes: writes PNG sequence; cap frame count

name: set_animation_range
return: (start, end, fps) as a tuple of ints.
side_effects: mutates scene.render / scene timeline settings

name: set_object_origin
side_effects: moves object origin (mutates mesh + transform)

name: swing_door
signature: swing_door(obj, hinge_world_pos, axis='Z', closed_deg=0, open_deg=90, start_frame=1, swing_in_frame=150, swing_out_frame=175, end_frame=192)
side_effects: inserts keyframes on the target object
notes: sets origin to hinge before rotation keyframes

name: import_fbx
side_effects: imports external file and adds objects to the scene

name: import_glb
side_effects: imports external file and adds objects to the scene

name: import_obj
side_effects: imports external file and adds objects to the scene

name: gn_array_along_curve
side_effects: creates / attaches a geometry-nodes modifier
notes: geometry-nodes graph builder; verify node names per Blender version

name: gn_random_transform
side_effects: creates / attaches a geometry-nodes modifier
notes: geometry-nodes graph builder; verify node names per Blender version

name: gn_scatter_on_surface
side_effects: creates / attaches a geometry-nodes modifier
notes: geometry-nodes graph builder; verify node names per Blender version
